phrases.en: Pam opens her inbox on the computer.
phrases.zh: 帕姆在电脑上打开她的收件箱。

phrases.en: She finds an interesting email from her boss.
phrases.zh: 她找到一封老板发来的有趣邮件。

phrases.en: She thinks her coworker should read it too.
phrases.zh: 她觉得她的同事也应该看看这封邮件。

phrases.en: She clicks the message to open it.
phrases.zh: 她点击这条信息把它打开。

phrases.en: She reads it carefully one more time.
Then she clicks the Forward button at the top.
phrases.zh: 然后她点击顶部的“转发”按钮。

phrases.en: A blank box appears for the new address.
phrases.zh: 出现一个空白框，用来填写新的地址。

phrases.en: She types her coworker's email address in the To field.
phrases.zh: 她在收件人栏里输入同事的电子邮箱地址。

phrases.en: She adds a short note above the old message.
phrases.zh: 她在原邮件上方加了一句简短的留言。

phrases.en: She writes, "Please take a look at this."
She checks the address again to be sure it is right.
phrases.zh: 她再次核对地址，确保填写无误。

phrases.en: Finally, she clicks Send and forwards the email.
phrases.zh: 最后，她点击“发送”，把邮件转发出去。
